---
title: "Bobtail_activity"
author: "DEKERLE_Louis"
date: "2026-05-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r LIBRARIES}

library(ggplot2)

```

```{r DATA}

data_bob = read.csv("metadata.csv", sep =";", header = TRUE)

```

```{r exploratory graphs}



```
